tweets.author: joshmolnarverified.bsky.social
tweets.text: The power law. For 15 years Bitcoin has orbited a single long term trend line. It runs hot in euphoria, slips below it in fear, and always comes back. Every cycle bottom in history printed just under that line, and the line keeps climbing.

tweets.author: joshmolnarverified.bsky.social
tweets.text:
The Bitcoin bottom is not a guess. It is a probability.

Most people throw out one scary number. The data tells a calmer, more useful story, and it comes down to three things almost nobody explains.#Bitcoin #BTC #Crypto #BitcoinCycle #PowerLaw
